# MDE v1.6.4

## Features

- No new user-facing features.

## Bug Fixes

- Fixed a desktop editor regression where selecting another Explorer directory while a Markdown document was open could leave the editor blank or appear cleared.
- Rehydrated recreated BlockNote editor instances from the active draft so dirty Markdown remains visible after Explorer folder selection and editor recreation.
- Preserved save eligibility when the active draft differs from the persisted Markdown, so dirty drafts remain saveable after directory selection.
- Passed persisted Markdown and active draft Markdown separately from the desktop app into the shared editor, preventing clean folder selection from forcing unnecessary editor writes.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Updated the workspace release metadata to `1.6.4` for the root workspace, desktop app, and changed private editor-react package.
- Added focused unit, integration, and E2E coverage for editor draft preservation and Explorer folder-selection behavior.

## Documentation/User Manual

- No user manual update was required. This release restores the existing expected Explorer/editor workflow and does not change documented UI flows, settings, copy, shortcuts, troubleshooting guidance, or public manual content.
- `pnpm run docs:build` was not required because no `user-manual/`, docs site config, or docs script files changed.

## Verification

- Architecture review: ALL PASS.
- General code review: ALL PASS.
- Manual divergent testing: 3 rounds ALL PASS, including real Electron clean and dirty Explorer folder-selection runtime validation.
- Local verification completed before release metadata changes:
  - `pnpm run lint`
  - `pnpm run typecheck`
  - `pnpm run build`
  - `pnpm run test:unit` (82 files / 563 tests)
  - `pnpm run test:integration` (71 files / 214 tests)
  - `pnpm run test:e2e` (63 Playwright tests plus editor performance smoke)
  - `git diff --check`
- Release verification rerun for `v1.6.4`:
  - `pnpm run lint`
  - `pnpm run typecheck`
  - `pnpm run build`
  - `pnpm run test:unit`
  - `pnpm run test:integration`
  - `pnpm run test:e2e`
  - `git diff --check`

## Artifacts

- GitHub Actions Release workflow publishes macOS DMG/ZIP artifacts and Windows NSIS installer artifacts for `v1.6.4`.
- macOS signing and notarization remain optional for the no-paid-account release path; unsigned macOS artifacts are expected when signing secrets are not configured.
